title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
